Name: Höegh Evi
Description:
Höegh Evi is the vital link to secure transition—delivering fast, adaptable, and secure solutions that respond to countries’ evolving energy needs. For 50 years, Höegh Evi has been a pioneer and global leader in floating energy infrastructure, with one of the world’s largest fleets of FSRUs (floating storage and regasification units) for importing natural gas.  
Today, Höegh Evi is building the infrastructure needed to make the energy transition possible, with floating terminals for ammonia and hydrogen import, the world’s first floating ammonia-to-hydrogen cracker, and services for carbon transport and permanent storage.  

Höegh Evi is a global company with a highly skilled global team of 900 employees at sea and onshore. Learn more at hoeghevi.com

Name: Compass
Description:
Somos a Compass, uma empresa da @Cosan.  Nascemos do sonho de pessoas que acreditavam que poderiam contribuir com a transformação do mercado de gás do Brasil, ampliando e diversificando a sua oferta, desenvolvendo a infraestrutura e expandindo a sua demanda.

Hoje esse sonho vem se tornando realidade com o propósito de promover uma transição energética segura e eficiente. O nosso time se dedica todos os dias para levar segurança, flexibilidade e competitividade à matriz energética brasileira.

Nosso foco é entregar resultados concretos sempre com impactos positivos. E como fazemos isso? Com um jeito só nosso: sempre ousados, conectados, transparentes.

Para saber mais, acesse nosso site!

Name: OQGN
Description: We are OQ Gas Networks. A member of the OQ Group.

Name: Necta Gás Natural
Description:
Há mais de 26 anos, a Necta Gás Natural atua como uma referência no fornecimento, distribuição e desenvolvimento de soluções sustentáveis em gás natural e biometano. Com forte presença no mercado energético, entregamos energia limpa, segura e de alta performance para indústrias, comércios, residências e mobilidade.

Somos uma empresa comprometida com a sustentabilidade, inovação e geração de valor para clientes, parceiros e comunidades.

Nossa missão é transformar energia em desenvolvimento sustentável, conectando pessoas, empresas e cidades às melhores soluções em gás natural, sempre com segurança e qualidade.

Seja nosso parceiro na construção de um futuro energético mais limpo e inteligente.

Name: American Gas Association
Description: The American Gas Association, founded in 1918, represents more than 200 local energy companies that deliver clean natural gas throughout the United States.  There are more than 73 million residential, commercial and industrial natural gas customers in the U.S., of which 95 percent — just under 69 million customers — receive their gas from AGA members. AGA is an advocate for natural gas utility companies and their customers and provides a broad range of programs and services for member natural gas pipelines, marketers, gatherers, international natural gas companies and industry associates. Today, natural gas meets more than one-fourth of the United States' energy needs.

Name: Megha City Gas Distribution Private Limited
Description: MeghaGas is executing the City Gas Distribution (CGD) projects in India. Supplies Piped Natural Gas to domestic, commercial, and industrial customers & CNG for the Automobile sector. Caters to 10% of the population & 10% of the geographical area in India.

Name: Sulgás
Description:
Somos a Sulgás!

Responsáveis pela distribuição do gás natural canalizado no Rio Grande do Sul, contribuímos para o desenvolvimento econômico e social do Estado, atuando de forma eficiente, segura e sustentável. Estamos atentos ao futuro, com o objetivo de transformar o mercado, utilizando fontes de energia de transição.
 
Buscamos pessoas proativas e que consigam trabalhar coletivamente para que, juntos, possamos consolidar nosso legado no mercado de gás natural e biometano no país. Não fazemos distinção entre pessoas candidatas, seja por gênero, deficiência, orientação sexual, raça/etnia, idade, origem, constituição familiar ou estética. Valorizamos tudo aquilo que te torna um indivíduo único.
 
Se você se identificou com a nossa proposta, queremos conhecê-lo!
 
Acesse nossa página de carreiras: https://www.sulgas.com.vc/trabalhe-conosco/
Location: Porto Alegre, Rio Grande do Sul

Name: Promigas Perú
Description:
Lideramos la transformación energética del norte del Perú con la distribución y comercialización de gas natural, generando valor, progreso y bienestar en las cinco regiones donde operamos.
Somos Energía que Impulsa Desarrollo.

Name: Gasmig - Companhia de Gás de Minas Gerais
Description:
A Companhia de Gás de Minas Gerais (Gasmig) é a distribuidora exclusiva de gás natural canalizado em todo o território mineiro, por outorga de concessão pelo Estado de Minas Gerais, atendendo aos segmentos industrial, uso geral, residencial, gás natural comprimido, gás natural liquefeito, automotivo e termelétrico.

A Gasmig é uma sociedade anônima sob o controle indireto do Estado de Minas Gerais, sendo seus acionistas a Companhia Energética de Minas Gerais – CEMIG (99,6%) e o Município de Belo Horizonte – PBH (0,4%).

MISSÃO
Desenvolver soluções energéticas limpas e seguras por meio do gás natural, criando valor para clientes, colaboradores e acionistas, contribuindo para o desenvolvimento de Minas Gerais.

VISÃO
Duplicar a extensão de rede, expandindo a atuação para mais quatro mesorregiões de Minas Gerais ainda não atendidas e triplicando o número de clientes atendidos até 2027.

Name: Énestas Energy & Gas
Description:
Énestas is a mexican company with an innovative business model that comes from the necessity to generate power at a lower cost, reduce the energy consumption, and take care of the environment.

Our Mission
To provide the development of an efficient electrical and thermal consumption of medium and small companies through the operation, maintenance and financing of cogeneration and trigeneration projects.

Our Vision
Create the largest network of efficient electrical and thermal consumption in Mexico and other countries.

Name: Compagas
Description:
Ao seu lado, levando mais eficiência,
valor e conforto. Sempre.
Mais do que gás natural, entregamos tranquilidade.
Nosso compromisso é oferecer um fornecimento contínuo e seguro, que se integra à rotina da sua indústria, comércio, condomínio ou empreendimento sem interrupções.

Name: Naturgy México
Description:
Una energética no solo adaptada al futuro, sino al presente. 
Contrata tu servicio aquí: bit.ly/2O2FS3g

Name: Floene
Description:
The Floene group is the largest gas distribution operator in Portugal, with the participation and direct management of 9 Gas Distribution Regional Operators (ORDs) and a presence in more than 100 municipalities from the north to the south of the country. As such, it is responsible for managing the medium and low pressure gas distribution network on a public service basis, currently providing gas to more than a million customers.
It has one of the most modern gas networks in Europe, with more than 13,500 km of predominantly polyethylene pipelines, and is ready to distribute the new renewable gases such as biomethane and hydrogen. 
Over its 175-year history, Floene has led several of the nation’s energy transformations - firstly, with the introduction of mains gas, and then the transition to natural gas. It is now ready for another type of evolution, bringing renewable gas to businesses, communities and families. 
With the aim of Promoting Sustainable Communities, we want to actively contribute to a carbon-neutral society via the decarbonisation of our gas infrastructure, working actively and in close proximity to our customers in the regions where we operate. From the north to the south of Portugal, making the energy of the future accessible to everybody.

Name: GASTEC
Description:
The Egyptian International Gas Technology.
An joint stock company,  is one of the Egyptian petroleum sector companies affiliated to EGAS.
GASTEC is the leading company in the field of establishing and operating CNG fueling stations and vehicles conversion centers to run by CNG.

Name: Nortegas
Description:
Nortegas es una compañía de infraestructuras y servicios energéticos que cuenta con más de un millón de clientes, tanto domésticos como industriales, a quienes suministra gas natural y GLP a través de una red de más de 8.100 kilómetros en Asturias, Cantabria y País Vasco, lo que le convierte en el segundo operador de distribución de gas del mercado español.
Nuestra misión es poner a disposición de nuestros clientes un combustible sostenible y seguro, como es el gas natural, aportando soluciones energéticas competitivas e innovadoras, tanto en los usos térmicos tradicionales, como en los ligados al gas natural como combustible para el transporte, priorizando en todo momento la seguridad y la excelencia en el servicio. 
Para ello, contamos con un equipo con gran experiencia, alineado con el compromiso de la compañía con la transición energética y la economía circular, descarbonizando la economía desde nuestra actividad tradicional, a través del gas natural como combustible alternativo para usos térmicos y para el transporte, sustituyendo así combustibles más contaminantes y promoviendo iniciativas y proyectos en torno a los gases de origen renovable, como el biometano o el hidrógeno, construyendo así el futuro de la distribución en la economía descarbonizada.
En Nortegas aspiramos a ser un agente de cambio hacia un mundo más sostenible, desarrollando soluciones energéticas que ayuden a conseguir el bienestar presente y futuro de la sociedad y del territorio que nos rodea.

Name: Natgas México
Description:
En Natgas, transformamos el futuro del transporte sostenible al ser pioneros en soluciones de Gas Natural Vehicular (GNV). Nos especializamos en proporcionar combustible limpio, eficiente y económico que reduce la huella de carbono y fomenta un impacto positivo en el medio ambiente y la economía.

Con una red de estaciones estratégicamente ubicadas, tecnología de punta y un equipo comprometido, impulsamos a nuestros clientes a adoptar un transporte más seguro y responsable. Ya sea para flotas comerciales, transporte público o vehículos particulares, Natgas ofrece soluciones que marcan la diferencia. Conectemos para avanzar juntos hacia un futuro más verde y eficiente.

Name: TAQA Gas
Description:
TAQA Gas has been leading the natural gas sector in Egypt for more than 25 years, and the industry pioneer has recently announced heading the gas industry for 15 more years, setting itself apart from any competition in the natural gas industry. With a vast distribution network that acts as the primary provider of natural gas for more than 1.6 million contracted residential customers, 5.500 commercial customers, 302 industrial customers, 5 power stations and 59 NGV stations, and 89 touristic facilities, TAQA Gas is currently converting 150,000 customers every year, empowered and supported by the Egyptian government’s ambitious plan to further expand the use of natural gas in residential households across the remaining areas in Egypt. 

TAQA Gas has proudly obtained the ISO 9001 certificate for Quality and the ISO 14001 certificate for Environmental protection in 2015 and more recently has acquired the ISO 45001 certificate for Occupational Health & Safety in 2018.

TAQA Gas also owns Master Gas, a leading company in the field of Marketing CNG as an alternative fuel for cars since 2004, made available through a wide network of centers and stations for converting cars to using natural gas and Virtual pipeline "Mobile CNG". 
TAQA Gas also owns House Gas which caters to the contracting sector, as well as its fully owned engineering company TAQA Gas Services which is responsible for all the relevant engineering works and Gas Heating Systems.
TAQA Gas offers a wide scope of services that cover all the natural gas needs of any residential, commercial, industrial, or touristic entity in MENA.

Name: Singapore GasCo
Description:
Singapore GasCo Pte Ltd (GasCo) is established with a national mandate to safeguard Singapore's energy future. We centralise the procurement and supply of natural gas for the nation's power sector, ensuring a secure, stable, and competitively priced energy supply that drives our economy and everyday life. 

As Singapore advances towards a cleaner energy future, GasCo plays a pivotal role in maintaining reliability while supporting the scalable development of alternative energy solutions and emerging technologies. 

Looking ahead, we remain committed to being both an energy enabler and a trusted leader in shaping Singapore's energy transition.

Name: Miran Energy
Description:
Miran Energy is a joint venture between HKN Energy and ONEX Group, formed to develop the
Miran Gas Field in partnership with the Kurdistan Regional Government. The venture combines
deep technical capability and a long-term investment approach to deliver sustainable energy
solutions.

Name: Rosetta Energy
Description: Rosetta is an international energy developer and operator focused on transitioning the energy ecosystem in emerging markets to a clean and sustainable future. We strongly believe in utilizing LNG as a transition fuel, displacing the use of higher GHG-emitting fuels, whilst developing zero-carbon solutions on a pathway to decarbonization.

Name: SonaGás ER
Description: A Sonangol Gás e Energias Renováveis (SonaGás ER) é uma subsidiaria da Sonangol E.P, criada em Setembro de 2004, que desenvolve, gere os negócios de Gás Natural, LPG e Energias Renováveis em Angola. Tem como objecto social de produzir, processar, armazenar, transformar e comercializar gás natural e seus derivados.

Name: Commit Gás
Description:
Somos a Commit, referência em gestão e inovação na distribuição de gás canalizado. Uma empresa da Compass e da Mitsui que conecta as melhores práticas do setor com tecnologia, eficiência e conhecimento.

Com participação em diversas distribuidoras pelo país, atuamos com disciplina, inspiração e a experiência de um time de excelência.  

Estamos comprometidos em levar o gás natural – uma energia segura, competitiva e mais limpa – a ainda mais pessoas, negócios e cidades no Brasil.

Name: The Presidential Initiative on Compressed Natural Gas & Electric Vehicles (Pi-CNG)
Description:
The Presidential Compressed Natural Gas Initiative (PCNGI) is a flagship program of the Federal Government of Nigeria launched in 2023 to fast-track the country’s shift to cleaner, more affordable, and more sustainable transportation energy sources.

Rooted in the Renewed Hope Agenda, PCNGI promotes the adoption of Compressed Natural Gas (CNG) and electric vehicles (EVs) particularly in mass transit systems delivering cost savings, job creation, energy security, and environmental benefits.

What You’ll Find Here:
• Updates on CNG & EV adoption across Nigeria
• Behind-the-scenes footage of conversion centers and refueling stations
• Driver and technician training highlights
• Success stories from beneficiaries and operators
• Stakeholder roundtables, launches, and community engagement
• Insightful explainer videos and public awareness contents 

Follow our journey as we build a future powered by clean, affordable energy for every Nigerian.

Name: Confidence Group- CNG Stations
Description: CNG is an attractive alternative fuel option that provides a cleaner, cheaper, & sustainable solution

Name: MSGÁS - Companhia de Gás do Estado de Mato Grosso do Sul
Description:
A MSGÁS tem por objeto:
I – Executar serviços relativos à pesquisa tecnológica, exploração, produção, aquisição, armazenamento; produção e comercialização independente de energia elétrica; transporte, transmissão, importação, exportação, fabricação e montagem de componentes necessários ao suprimento do mercado de gás; distribuição, comercialização e transporte de gás natural e/ou subprodutos e derivados, bem como atuação na área de serviços de transmissão de dados, imagens e informações, por meio de implantação de rede de telecomunicações juntamente com a rede de distribuição de gás natural.

II – Exercer atividades correlatas à sua finalidade principal, especialmente execução de estudos, pesquisas e projetos relacionados com o setor de gás, inclusive sob forma de prestação de serviços de consultoria técnica a terceiros.
Location: Campo Grande, Mato Grosso do Sul

Name: Delta Utilities
Description: Delta Utilities is a leading natural gas utility with a focus on safe, dependable service to customers. Headquartered in New Orleans, Louisiana, the utility will serve nearly 600,000 customers and become one of the leading natural gas providers in Louisiana and Mississippi and among the top 40 providers in the United States.

Name: Hope Gas
Description: Safety is our top priority. DO NOT report emergencies via social media. Our social media isn't monitored 24/7. To report a natural gas emergency, call our 24-hour Emergency number at 1-800-934-3187. Always call 911 for emergency response.

Name: Coastal Bend LNG
Description:
Coastal Bend LNG is a privately held energy infrastructure development company redefining LNG production with integrated carbon capture and storage. With a focus on sustainability, innovation, and operational excellence, the company will deliver low-carbon American LNG to the world.  
   
From the ground up, Coastal Bend LNG has been designed to deliver low-carbon intensity LNG from the Texas Gulf Coast to the world. The facility will leverage carbon capture and other greenhouse gas mitigation technologies and be supported by the industry’s most robust monitoring, reporting, and verification capabilities across the natural gas supply chain.

Name: Gas Natural del Noroeste S.A. de C.V.
PCNGI - Presidential Compressed Natural Gas Initiative
Description:
The Presidential CNG Initiative (P-CNGi) is a key component of the palliative interventions introduced by the Bola Ahmed Tinubu administration. Our mission is to provide relief to the masses affected by the transitional hardships resulting from the Federal Government of Nigeria's fuel subsidy removal policy.

In response to the removal of the PMS subsidy and the full deregulation of the petroleum products market, the price of PMS has risen significantly. Consequently, there is a pressing need to explore alternative fuel sources. P-CNGi is dedicated to promoting Compressed Natural Gas (CNG) and Electric Vehicles (EVs) as viable and sustainable options for the future of transportation in Nigeria.

Join us as we drive towards a cleaner, greener, and more affordable energy future for all.

Name: SERGAS - Sergipe Gás S.A.
Description:
A SERGAS é uma Companhia de direito privado, sociedade de economia mista, vinculada à Secretaria de Estado do Desenvolvimento Econômico e da Ciência e Tecnologia. 

A entidade foi criada no ano de 1993, com o objetivo de distribuir gás natural canalizado aos diversos segmentos de mercado (comercial, industrial, residencial, automotivo, geração e outros), seja para fins de matéria prima, de geração de energia, ou de quaisquer outras formas de utilização ou finalidade que os avanços tecnológicos permitam contribuir para o desenvolvimento econômico e social do estado.

Name: Mitsui Gás e Energia do Brasil
Description: A Mitsui Gás e Energia do Brasil(MGEB) é uma holding 100% controlada pela Mitsui & Co. Ltd.(Japão).

Name: Vulcan
Description:
Società Italiana Gas Liquidi Spa nasce oltre 50 anni fa con lo scopo di fornire alla Sua clientela energia pulita ed economica. 
Siamo stati il primo operatore italiano e tra i primi in Europa nella commercializzazione di GNL e BIOGNL. 

Vulcan è sinonimo di efficienza, qualità, innovazione e tutela dell’ambiente.
La nostra decennale esperienza ci rende il partner ideale per guidare le aziende verso un futuro energetico più pulito, garantendo ascolto e assistenza continua al cliente.

Da oltre 50 anni la nostra energia al Vostro servizio.

Name: GRUPO CLISA
Description: We began operations in 1990 with the import and sale of lubricants and in 1997 we were established as a business group. We consist of various subsidiaries organized in five divisions: Energy, Logistics, Trade and Services, Real Estate and Infrastructure. We have alliances and strategic partners both in Mexico and overseas. The group has more than 2,000 employees.
Location: San Pedro Garza García, Nuevo Leon

Name: Texas LNG
Description: Texas LNG is a 4 mtpa LNG export facility to be constructed in the Port of Brownsville, Texas and owned and managed by Texas LNG Brownsville LLC, an affiliate of global energy transition leader Glenfarne Energy Transition, LLC. Samsung Engineering Co., Ltd. owns a minority equity interest and is leading the delivery of the facility along with Technip Energies USA. Texas LNG is led by an experienced team committed to creating one of the greenest LNG facilities in the world. Additional information about Texas LNG may be found on its website at www.texaslng.com.

Name: Réseau GDS - Gaz de Strasbourg
Description:
R-GDS (Réseau GDS) est une société d'économie mixte dont les actionnaires sont la Ville de Strasbourg (50,1%), la Caisse des Dépôts (25%) et Engie (24,9%). Gestionnaire du réseau de distribution de gaz naturel à Strasbourg et dans plus de 120 communes du Bas-Rhin, R-GDS achemine chaque année près de 5 milliards de kWh de gaz vers 110 000 clients. 

Acteur engagé de la transition énergétique des territoires, le groupe R-GDS fonde son développement sur 3 axes structurants : les infrastructures de distribution de gaz naturel et réseaux de chaleur bas-carbone, la rénovation énergétique des bâtiments et les énergies renouvelables issues de filières locales, avec le biométhane et demain, l'hydrogène vert.

Description: Vadodara Gas Limited is a Joint Venture Company between GAIL Gas Limited and Vadodara Municipal Corporation

Name: Companhia Maranhense de Gás - GASMAR
Description: A Companhia Maranhense de Gás - GASMAR, é uma Sociedade Anônima, de capital fechado, que detém, com exclusividade, a concessão para exploração dos serviços de distribuição e comercialização de gás canalizado em todo o território do Estado do Maranhão.

Name: CENAGAS
Description: El Cenagas es un organismo público descentralizado de la Administración Pública Federal, sectorizado a la Secretaría de Energía, con personalidad jurídica y patrimonio propios.

Name: Holdinova group
Description:
Le groupe HOLDINOVA est un acteur majeur dans l’énergie et le bâtiment en Suisse romande. Il regroupe des sociétés spécialisées dans la distribution de gaz naturel-biogaz (Energiapro SA, CICG, SGPR, Cosvegaz SA), l'analyse des réseaux et la sécurité de distribution (Corelltech SA), la production de biogaz à partir de déchets organiques (Ecorecyclage SA), l’énergie solaire (Agena SA), le sanitaire (Joseph Diémand SA), le chauffage (Brauchli SA et Taxa SA), la ventilation-climatisation (Roos Ventilation SA) et la cogénération (Cogen SA).

La diversité des spécialités et l’expérience dans les différents domaines de compétences permettent au groupe et à ses filiales d’apporter des prestations sur mesure aux particuliers, aux entreprises et aux collectivités.

UN INVESTISSEMENT CONSTANT DANS LES ÉNERGIES RENOUVELABLES
Le groupe mise sur les énergies renouvelables (biogaz, solaire, CAD, éolien) et sa démarche s’inscrit dans la ligne de la Stratégie énergétique 2050. Il soutient tout particulièrement le développement des gaz renouvelables. La production annuelle de biogaz sur son réseau de distribution est en constante progression grâce à ses quatre sites d'injection.

UN ENGAGEMENT DANS LA FORMATION
HOLDINOVA s’engage dans la formation et favorise les places d’apprentissage. Elle soutient tout particulièrement la relève professionnelle dans les métiers de la construction (chauffage, sanitaire et ventilation). Sur un effectif d’environ 480 employés, plus de 50 places de travail sont occupées par des apprentis.

UN SOUTIEN MARQUÉ À LA VIE LOCALE
Il lui tient à cœur de participer à la vie sportive et culturelle des associations et organismes domiciliés sur son réseau de distribution. Depuis sa création, le groupe a soutenu intensément de nombreuses manifestations régionales.

LA SÉCURITÉ, UNE PRIORITÉ
Par la nature de ses activités dans le bâtiment et l’énergie, le groupe porte une attention toute particulière à la sécurité de son personnel et de ses clients.

Name: Respect Energy Fuels
Description:
Natural gas and LNG for businesses and residential customers - simply, reliably and on your terms.

ReFuels is a Polish company providing natural gas and LNG where reliability, flexibility and real savings count. We serve business and retail customers throughout Poland, offering secure, efficient and competitively priced energy solutions.

 Security of supply all year round
With proven sources and flexible supply models, we ensure continuity of supply even under the most demanding conditions. Energy is supposed to arrive at all times - and we guarantee it.

 Your energy independence
Independence from market fluctuations and unpredictable costs. We offer solutions that put you in control - both in your business and at home.

 Real savings for your business
Natural gas and LNG are energy-efficient fuels that allow you to significantly reduce production, heating or transportation costs. With us, you pay less - without compromising on quality.

 Offer tailored to your needs
Individual approach, flexible contracts, support at every stage of cooperation. We understand the needs of industry, SME sector and individual customers.

 Polish company, local support
We are an independent company with Polish capital. We operate locally and with commitment - always close to your needs.

Contact us and see how much you can gain.
Call, write or make an appointment for a free consultation - we will prepare an offer tailored to your goals.

Name: HOLDIGAZ SA
Description:
Le groupe HOLDIGAZ est un acteur majeur dans l’énergie et le bâtiment en Suisse romande. Par le biais de ses filiales actives dans la distribution de gaz naturel/biogaz (fourniture d’énergie et réseaux), il dessert 162 communes des cantons de Vaud, Valais et Fribourg. Il est également spécialisé dans l’énergie solaire, le sanitaire, le chauffage et la climatisation-ventilation via ses autres sociétés. 

La diversité des spécialités, le savoir-faire ainsi que l’expérience dans les différents domaines de compétences permet au groupe et à ses filiales d’apporter un conseil énergétique global et des prestations de qualité aux privés et aux entreprises.

INNOVATION ET RESPECT DE L’ENVIRONNEMENT
Le groupe mise sur le renouvelable et sa démarche s’inscrit dans la ligne de la Stratégie énergétique 2050. En effet, il soutient et développe des innovations dans ce domaine, et la production annuelle de biogaz sur son réseau de distribution est en constante augmentation, ce qui fait de Holdigaz le plus gros producteur de biogaz de Suisse romande.

UN ENGAGEMENT DANS LA FORMATION
Holdigaz s’engage aussi dans la formation et favorise les places d’apprentissage. Il soutient tout particulièrement la relève professionnelle dans les métiers de la construction (chauffage, sanitaire, ventilation). Sur un effectif de 430 employés, plus de 60 places de travail sont occupées par des apprentis.

UN SOUTIEN MARQUÉ À LA VIE SOCIALE
Il lui tient à cœur de participer à la vie sportive et culturelle des associations et organismes domiciliés sur son réseau de distribution. Depuis sa création, le groupe a soutenu intensément de nombreuses manifestations régionales.

LA SÉCURITÉ EN PRIORITÉ
Par la nature de ses activités dans le bâtiment et l’énergie, le groupe porte une attention toute particulière à la sécurité de son personnel et de ses clients.

Finalement, Holdigaz développe ses activités sur la base d’un modèle de croissance responsable, respectueux de l’individu et de l’environnement.

Name: Plugue
Description:
A Plugue nasceu com o propósito de fazer da inovação a sua jornada! Criou seu conceito, essência, princípios e valores e, em 2021, deu os seus primeiros passos integrando conteúdos, metodologias, processos de trabalho, além de conexões e projetos reais com prognósticos mensuráveis e escaláveis.

O objetivo é construir hoje a cidade do amanhã, incluindo as pessoas no centro e a eficiência em nossas jornadas. Somos um espaço aberto em que se estabelecem relações de co-criação e onde se gera valor positivo para todo o ecossistema, considerando a sociedade e a sustentabilidade do nosso planeta.

Temos 4 principais áreas de atuação: Experimentação, Aprendizado, Conexão e Geração de Negócio. Já são mais de 20 startups contratadas, mais de 200 conectadas, diversos projetos em andamento em 5 áreas de atuação: Digital Construction, Energia Limpa e Renovável, Eficiência Energética, Cidades do Amanhã e Volume e Rentabilização.

Pessoas no foco, diversidade e o compromisso de tangibilizar e incluir ESG em todas as decisões do negócio fazem parte da nossa meta. Assim como novas soluções energéticas com tecnologia e inovação, fazendo uso consciente dos recursos disponíveis no mundo e na comunidade.

Name: Energiapro SA
Description:
Energiapro SA est une société du groupe HOLDIGAZ spécialisée dans le domaine de l’énergie. Nos activités comprennent principalement l’approvisionnement en gaz naturel, la fourniture de biogaz, des solutions dans l’énergie solaire photovoltaïque, la mise à disposition de chaleur issue de sources d’énergie durables (CAD) ainsi que des certificats renouvelables. 

VENTE DE BIOGAZ
Le biogaz que nous vendons provient de sites de production situés sur le réseau du groupe HOLDIGAZ dans les cantons de Vaud (Lavigny, Penthaz, Roche) et du Valais (Collombey-Muraz). Les quantités de biogaz injectées et vendues sont contrôlées par un organe de clearing, sur mandat de la Direction générale des douanes (DGD). Ainsi, les consommateurs ont la garantie que le biogaz qu’ils achètent a bien été injecté dans le réseau de gaz naturel. 

VERS UN FUTUR RENOUVELABLE
Nous sommes à votre disposition pour vous communiquer les dernières informations du marché de l'énergie, mais également pour vous conseiller en matière de combinaisons d'énergies ou d'économies d'énergie. Les méthodes utilisées sont en permanence adaptées afin de proposer les meilleures prestations en vue d'un futur renouvelable.

SYNERGIE DES COMPÉTENCES AU SEIN DU GROUPE
En tant que société du groupe HOLDIGAZ, nous collaborons étroitement avec nos sociétés soeurs dans le cadre notamment des solutions proposées aux régies immobilières, aux propriétaires (particuliers, professionnels et collectivités), plus particulièrement dans les domaines du contracting solaire et thermique. Ce regroupement de compétences permet de proposer une solution globale au client, en fonction de ses besoins.

Description:
Przez ponad 30 lat istnienia firmy zdobywaliśmy doświadczenie, przeprowadziliśmy szereg projektów inwestycyjnych i znacząco rozwinęliśmy swoją działalność stając się liderem wśród prywatnych dystrybutorów gazu ziemnego w Polsce. Docieramy do kolejnych regionów, wspierając ich prężny rozwój.
Niezawodnie dostarczamy gaz ziemny do naszych odbiorców, odpowiadamy za bezpieczeństwo swojego systemu gazowego, jego rozbudowę, konserwację i eksploatację;
Dostarczamy energię bezpieczną dla środowiska i otoczenia. 
Ponad 4000 km sieci gazowych, którymi dystrybuujemy gaz ziemny zaopatruje 73 gminy w 5 województwach.
Pracujemy dla branż szczególnie wymagających stabilnych i nieprzerwanych dostaw paliwa, niezależnie od warunków pogodowych i wydajności systemu energetycznego, m.in. branży spożywczej, drobiarskiej, szklarniowej, suszarni zbóż, ciepłowniczej, logistycznej, drogowej, budowlanej, produkcyjnej, oświatowej oraz administracji rządowej.

Name: ГАЗМЕРЕЖІ
Description:
The Gas Distribution Networks of Ukraine LLC was founded on September 2, 2022 by the decision of Gas of Ukraine, a subsidiary company of Naftogaz of Ukraine in order to organize and harmonize gas distribution system of Ukraine under the single brand GAZMEREZHI.
According to Resolution of the CMU No. 1335 of November 25, 2022 «On the settlement of the issue of the use of gas distribution systems or their components», the state gas distribution networks were transferred for management to Gas Distribution Networks of Ukraine LLC.
The first license of the National Commission for State Regulation of Energy (NCSRE) for the distribution of natural gas in Kyrovograd region was issued on December 26, 2022. The Kropyvnytskyi branch of the Gas Distribution Networks of Ukraine LLC started the operational activity since January 1, 2023. 
The integration of OJSC Kharkivgaz and OJSC Dniprogaz started on January 16, 2023.
Furthermore, preparations are underway to obtain a license for three next operators.
The Gas Distribution Networks of Ukraine LLC is designed acting as the national operator of the gas distribution system of Ukraine in order to observe the state policy regarding the development and ensuring the functionality, continuity, integrity and stability of critical infrastructure objects, including stable provision of natural gas to the consumers.

Name: Juragas
Description:
Juragas (under PT Juragas Solusinfra Niaga) is a provider of Compressed Natural Gas (CNG) solutions centered in West Java, Indonesia, that distributes to the industrial and retail sector.

Our mission is simple – to ignite advantage from your business operations. Juragas delivers positive impact to your bottom line and to the environment with our efficient and green natural gas energy solutions.

Juragas provides end-to-end CNG solution for businesses, which includes:
1. CNG Distribution: Delivery of CNG to your doorstep using our fleet of Gas Transport Modules (GTM), ensuring 100% gas availability for your operations.
2. CNG Daughter Station Provider: Provision, installation, and maintenance of daughter station facility (including CNG tanks, Pressure Reduction System (PRS), gas metering and pipeline) at your site to utilize CNG for your operations.

Why should you switch to natural gas?
1. Lower energy cost. For the equivalent amount of caloric value, CNG has lower cost by up to 30% compared with LPG.
2. Transparent usage. Your CNG usage will be billed exactly based on metric volume, not number of gas tanks.
3. Better safety. In the unlikely event of gas leakage, CNG is safer as it will rise to the atmosphere given its lower density compared to air
4. Environmentally friendlier. Carbon emission of CNG is one of the lowest compared to all energy sources – 11% lower compared to even LPG.

While it delivers all the performance benefits of a permanent or semi-permanent fueling infrastructure, the MSRU is also fully mobile, easy to deploy, and has a much lower initial capital and ongoing operational and maintenance costs which result in significant operational flexibility and favorable economics for end users.

Description:
EBI Énergie est le plus important détaillant de Gaz Naturel Comprimé (GNC) et Renouvelable (GNR) au Québec. Depuis 2013, l’entreprise se spécialise dans la vente de GNC/GNR pour véhicules lourds. En plus de son réseau de stations publiques et privées en GNC/GNR, qui permet une mobilité étendue et grandissante, EBI Énergie se distingue avec son service d’accompagnement. Name: Gaznet Industrial
Description:
From 2005 Gaznet Industrial have provided storage and transport solutions for companies using compressed hydrogen, CNG & Biogas, throughout Eastern Europe, including Poland, Ukraine, and the Baltics. In 2017 we became exclusive Baltic distributors for Norwegian company UMOE Advanced Composites, offering Multi Element Gas Containers (MEGC) for Hydrogen and Compressed Natural Gas for transport.
 
The benefits of the intelligent material MEGC include: lightness, extended lifetime, extreme high flow, safety, and the amount of charge and discharge that no competitor can offer. The UAC container lasts 3 times longer than the average steel container and requires 2 times less testing. And all applications are ADR approved and inspected.
 
We also develop technical solutions within our industry for such clients as the Koksvere biomethane plant, and we provide biogas transport to both the Viljandi entry point and the Paide bakery industry. Gaznet Industrial are also partners with the largest Polish gas company, Polska Spolka Gazownictwa, addressing the everyday issue of gas supply when scheduled maintenance is taking place. We ensure the transportation of gas to the community is uninterrupted, and production can continue, even while the maintenance of the pipeline is ongoing.
 
Another new project with PSG in Poland involves the refueling of trains with hydrogen, where we provide core equipment and technology that can easily be upgraded to a complete filling station by just adding a few components.
 
Whether you are looking to optimize your use of compressed hydrogen, CNG & Biogas, or finding innovative and cost effective transport and storage solutions. Gaznet Industrial delivers industry leading, safe and cost saving solutions, applying uncompromising quality, industry expertise and engineering knowhow. Contact us info@megccng.com for more information.

Name: Dinagas
Description:
La DINAGAS srl è specializzata nella distribuzione di gas GPL. Da 50 anni, siamo al fianco di privati e aziende per fornire soluzioni energetiche sicure, efficienti e sostenibili. 

1975 - 2025. Cinquant'anni di passione, dedizione e crescita: la nostra azienda è il frutto del coraggio e della visione del fondatore Antonio Di Natale, che ha trasformato un’intuizione in un’opportunità per tutti. Quando Antonio Di Natale decise di investire tutto ciò che aveva nel gas GPL, non immaginava che quella scelta avrebbe dato vita a una delle realtà più solide e affidabili del Sud Italia, un esempio di resilienza e innovazione.

MISSION and PHILOSOPHY. DINAGAS srl garantisce una fornitura GPL duratura e costante, soddisfacendo il fabbisogno di realtà industriali, piccole e medie imprese e soprattutto privati. Grazie alla rete capillare di distribuzione, copriamo Campania, Molise, Basilicata, gran parte della Calabria e parte del Lazio, diversificando le utenze sia in bombole che in serbatoi. Serviamo le aree meno accessibili del centro-sud Italia grazie ad autocisterne evolute, camion e furgoni per la distribuzione delle bombole GPL, che arrivano dovunque. Nel corso degli ultimi anni l’azienda ha migliorato il servizio, aumentando la competenza e l’affidabilità, intensificando la rete di distribuzione così da raggiungere l’obiettivo primario del rifornimento REAL TIME. 

I NOSTRI SERVIZI. Nel nostro stabilimento di Pagani ci occupiamo di stoccaggio, per mezzo di 9 serbatoi dalla capienza complessiva di 1.250 m3, imbottigliamento e movimentazione di GPL (art. 2 comma 1 del D. Lgs. 26 Giugno 2015, n°105). Le nostre soluzioni energetiche - GPL in Serbatoi interrati o fuori terra, GPL in Bombole, Impianti Multiutenza - sono flessibili e su misura; garantiamo forniture di GPL sicure e affidabili a privati, aziende, comunità. 

PUNTI DI FORZA. Personale qualificato, consulenza, assistenza e customer care. Dovunque, da 50 anni.

ENTRA IN DINAGAS. DINAGAS è per tutti.

Name: Intraco Energy
Description:
Intraco Energy ltd., one of the leading gas providers in Bangladesh understands the importance of Energy Gas Supply solutions for the country's growth and development. With the lack of Natural gas in Bangladesh, Intraco Energy provides reliable and efficient gas supply solutions to various industries. Our main gases include Compressed Natural Gas (CNG) and Liquefied Petroleum Gas (LPG).

CNG is a clean and economical alternative to traditional fossil fuels, making it an ideal choice for industries in Bangladesh. LPG, on the other hand, is widely used for heating, cooking, and automotive purposes. Our mission is to provide high-quality industrial gases to our clients, ensuring their smooth operation and growth.

At Intraco Energy, we have a team of experts who are knowledgeable and experienced in the industrial gas sector. Our team works tirelessly to ensure that our clients receive the best service possible. We understand the unique requirements of each industry and provide customized solutions to meet their needs. Whether it's supplying large quantities of gases to a manufacturing plant or providing small cylinder fills for a local business, we have the resources to meet the demands of our clients.

Name: Association of CGD Entities
Description:
The Association of CGD Entities (ACE), incorporated on December 30, 2020, under Section 8 of the Companies Act, 2013, is a not-for-profit organization dedicated to championing the growth and development of the City Gas Distribution (CGD) sector in India. Headquartered in Delhi, ACE unites forward-thinking entities committed to transforming India's energy landscape through natural gas centric sustainable and innovative solutions.

Our core members include leading players such as Adani Total Gas Ltd., Gujarat Gas Ltd., Megha Gas, THINK Gas (including AG&P which is part of THINK Gas now), and Torrent Gas Ltd. Associate members include Haryana City Gas, IRM Energy Ltd., and Unison Enviro Pvt. Ltd. (now part of Mahanagar Gas Ltd.).

Together, we are committed to creating an ecosystem where natural gas plays a pivotal role in India’s clean energy transition while setting new benchmarks in sustainability, innovation, and growth.

ACE aspires to establish itself as a global leader in low carbon and clean energy advocacy, ensuring natural gas remains pivotal in achieving a sustainable energy future while paving the way for the integration of Bio-gas, green hydrogen and other innovative solutions.

Rashal Energies a infrastructure and retail energy company focused on meeting Tanzania’s growing energy needs through the development of pipelines, fueling stations, and digital systems. Rashal Energies enables the country’s transition to cleaner, cheaper, and locally sourced natural gas by serving industrial parks, public transit fleets, and private motorists. Its offerings include direct pipeline distribution, proprietary CNG stations, vehicle conversion and servicing, microloans for conversion kits, and domestic plug-ins for clean cooking. By expanding access to natural gas, the company actively combats deforestation and improves household health outcomes across Tanzania. 

We believe that access to affordable energy brings increased wealth to people, allowing them to adopt cleaner solutions to meet these requirements. While we have a heritage of distributing petroleum products, we want to use our knowledge and infrastructure to promote cleaner alternatives.

Name: PFC Midstream
Description:
For more than 50 years, PFC Midstream has been a trusted partner in pipeline and energy infrastructure, delivering turnkey midstream solutions that move energy safely, reliably, and efficiently from source to end use. 

Serving customers across key U.S. energy regions, we specialize in pipeline engineering, design, construction, and operations support for industrial end-users, utilities, producers, and developers in the natural gas and energy infrastructure sectors.

Our integrated team of engineers, technicians, and project managers supports every phase of development — from front-end design and regulatory permitting to construction, integrity management, and ongoing maintenance. With NACE/AMPP-certified expertise in corrosion control, cathodic protection, and integrity assessment, PFC Midstream helps clients bring new supply online quickly, compliantly, and cost-effectively.

In addition to supporting traditional natural gas infrastructure, PFC partners with AI data and mining center operators to meet rising energy demand through customized delivery, efficiency, and maintenance solutions.

What sets us apart is our turnkey delivery model, commitment to safety, and technical depth — built on decades of field-tested experience and long-standing customer partnerships.

Visit PFCMidstream.com to explore our work or connect with our team to discuss your next pipeline or terminal project.

Name: ezNG Solutions LLC
Description:
ezNG Solutions offers license to our patented, pressure-competent cellular array tank technology that enables practical storage & transport of a less costly and greener form of LNG called Pressurized LNG (“PLNG”)… as well as NH3, or even CO2!
Pressurized LNG (“PLNG”) was proven to be much simpler, cheaper and greener than LNG decades ago, but the global gas industry did not adopt PLNG for storage or transport because NO practical means for large scale containment existed. ezNG’s innovations change the game, making possible the “big switch” to lower GHG emissions for natural gas liquefaction and use. Near term, ezNG offers technology licenses for storage of “common LNG” or PLNG to pipeline, bunkering, and power plant owners / developers. Longer term, ezNG will lead projects globally using its technology to help the world switch to greener liquid fuels (incl. NH3)... and to dramatically lower the costs for remotely sequestering liquefied CO2 for Carbon Capture & Sequestration initiatives.

TIBIEL Ltd. is a company registered in Bulgaria and it’s the first company to be granted a license for trading with natural gas in the country. All this is a result of TIBIEL Ltd’s ambition to become the biggest supplier of natural gas for corporate clients. The company holds a very high standard of it’s services and already has a few couple of the biggest consumers of natural gas in Bulgaria. One of them is the third largest consumer of natural gas – the district heating company of Pleven.

Its main activity is wholesale of solid, liquid and gaseous fuels and similar products. It has the expertise and the possibility to deliver large amounts of natural gas to several major industrial Bulgarian consumers. This is due to the fact that the company has both long term relation with the stated consumers, on one hand and also long terms gas delivery contracts, on the other.

TIBIEL Ltd. also specializes in the purchase and delivery of other fuel materials: among the main activities of the Company is the one, related to the purchase and delivery of various types of coal and diesel fuel.

The Company also carries out forwarding services – transport of coal and spedition of empty wagons. For executing the supplies to our clients, we cooperate with full-service networks and power supply service providers. 

In order to provide reliable gas supplies, we have access to the national gas transmission system of Bulgaria, Romania and Greece, also we are storing quantities of natural gas at the storage facility of Chiren in Bulgaria.

Our plan is to become the biggest nonpublic company trading and suppling with natural gas in Bulgaria and to be one of the leading names in the natural gas market in the region and in Europe. Taking the next step in achieving our goals is to spread our activities towards Italy and central Europe.

Name: Stu & The Gas Holes
Description:
“Stu and the Gas Holes” is a podcast dedicated to the exploration of energy sources and their role in society, the hosts Stuart Saulters, Chad Cuvo and Joe Serrett delve weekly into the fascinating world of energy. These episodes emphasize the pivotal role natural gas plays in today's energy landscape as well as discussions
based on alternate energy sources, and how this impacts the energy consciousness of America and the world.

The podcast will open with a introductions to natural gas, highlighting its clean-burning properties, versatility, and widespread use in powering our daily lives. Listeners will hear a detailed explanation of natural gas, providing a solid foundation for understanding its significance and a history of the natural gas industry.

This podcast will also touch on the global energy transition and the role of natural gas in this evolution highlighting how education is key to facilitating a seamless transition to cleaner and more sustainable energy sources.

To provide diverse perspectives, the hosts interview experts, educators, and students who have been positively impacted by the natural gas industry's involvement in education. Their stories help add depth and authenticity to the podcast/episodes.

In conclusion, "Stu and the Gas Holes” serves as a comprehensive guide to understanding the synergy between natural gas and global energy sustainability. It demonstrates how this energy source not only powers our world but also powers the minds of those who will shape our
future. 

This podcast episodes ultimately hope to inspire listeners to appreciate the multifaceted role of natural gas in our society and to support educational endeavors that will drive innovation and environmental stewardship.

Findings from extensive testing of Sparrow's technology in independent field trials sponsored by Natural Gas Utilities strongly support Sparrow's ability to greatly enhance natural gas safety in the home.
Our team brings years of experience to bear on one of the great challenges of our time, with over 50 patents, issued or pending, in methane sensors and related technologies.  Contact us to learn more.

Key topics will include the integration of CGD networks to improve urban and rural energy access, the expansion of LNG infrastructure to support India’s energy diversification, hydrogen as a transformative clean fuel, and the role of biogas in driving a circular economy. 
The previous edition was a great success, with impressive participation from speakers, branding partners, and attendees. The diversity of discussions and representation from various segments—such as cross-country pipelines, CGD/LNG companies, biogas, hydrogen technology providers, EPC companies, product and solution providers, researchers, asset owners, business facilitators, and manufacturers—was highly appreciated. În anul 2008 se înființează societatea Master Gaz, echipa care a fost restrânsă, dar care, cu muncă și perseverență, a reușit să crească și să profite din plin de reușite. Ne mândrim cu muncă pe care am depus-o, dovadă fiind cererile și clienții mulțumiți care au colaborat și continuă să colaboreze cu noi. Țelul nostru a fost să ajungem lideri în domeniul nostru de activitate de pe piață, iar asta ne-a ajutat să ne ambiționăm și să căpătăm roadele de astăzi. Suntem recunoscuți prin profesionalismul pe care l-am pus în fiecare proiect, cât și prin orientarea noastră către client și către lucrurile bine făcute, calitative, gata să asigure durabilitate și confort. Ceea ce ne motivează să creștem constant este mulțumirea pe care ne-o aduce clienții noștri. Serviciile oferite de către noi sunt menite să satisfacă nevoile, cerințele clienților, dar și siguranță acestora. Ne caracterizăm echipa prin cuvinte simple, dar care contează cel mai mult atunci când decizi să apelezi la astfel de servicii: profesionalism, promptitudine, calitate, durabilitate, servicii 360 grade, respect față de muncă noastră și față de client.

Description:

Fort de son expertise technique et réglementaire, notre fondateur a décidé de créer cette entreprise pour répondre aux besoins croissants du secteur en matière d'études fiables et innovantes.

Notre Mission :
IM GAZ EXPERT a pour mission de fournir des études précises et pertinentes pour la conception et l'analyse des réseaux GAZ. Nous souhaitons accompagner les entreprises dans la réalisation de leurs projets en garantissant des solutions sécuritaires, efficaces et durables pour les infrastructures gazières.

Notre Expertise :
Notre équipe, sous la direction d'un expert du secteur, est prête à se concentrer sur plusieurs axes :
Études de faisabilité : Analyse approfondie des projets pour assurer leur viabilité technique et économique.
Conception de réseaux : Élaboration de plans et spécifications adaptés à l’implantation de réseaux GAZ conformes aux normes.
Analyse d'impact : Études des conséquences environnementales et sociales des projets, en respectant les réglementations.
Suivi de projet : Assistance dans la gestion des études, en veillant au respect des délais et de la qualité.

Nos Valeurs :
Chez IM GAZ EXPERT, nous plaçons l'intégrité, la transparence et le professionnalisme au cœur de notre démarche. Nous croyons en l'importance d'établir des relations de confiance avec nos futurs clients en les impliquant tout au long du processus.

Conclusion :
IM GAZ EXPERT est la solution idéale pour les entreprises recherchant des études GAZ de haute qualité. Nous sommes à la recherche de partenaires pour collaborer et, ensemble, contribuer à la réussite de vos projets. N’hésitez pas à nous contacter à l’adresse im.gazexpert@outlook.com pour discuter de vos besoins et découvrir comment nous pouvons vous accompagner.

Name: BioMass4GLC
Description:
Plus de 3 milliards de personnes dans le monde sont exposées à des fumées toxiques, à des combustibles et à des feux ouverts dangereux pendant la cuisson de leurs repas. Pour 2 milliards ; il n’y a pas d’alternatives : L’électricité pour la cuisson ou la distribution de gaz ne sont pas disponibles ou coûtent trop chères. Au Mali, 90% des ménages utilisent du bois ou du charbon de bois et s’exposent donc à l’inhalation de fumée âcre et de particules fines entrainant des risques de maladies de la peau, des yeux et des poumons. Une exposition similaire à celle de fumer 20 paquets de cigarettes par jour. Les conséquences directes font que quatre millions de personnes dans le monde meurent chaque année. Au Mali, l’impact sanitaire de notre forte dépendance au bois et au charbon n’a pas fait l’objet d’étude ou de publication officielle cependant chacun d’entre nous à au moins une femme dans notre entourage qui supporte mal l’utilisation du bois et du charbon de bois. Le biogaz est un combustible de cuisson propre qui élimine ainsi la pollution de l’air intérieur dans les ménages en remplaçant le bois et le charbon de bois, préservant la santé des personnes tout en étant abordable. 
BioMass s’est lancée dans le domaine du biogaz depuis 2019 et s’efforce de fournir des solutions innovantes et abordables aux populations. Notre mission consiste à mettre à la disposition de chaque ménage un biodigesteur pour réduire ou stopper progressivement l’utilisation du bois et du charbon de bois. Contribuant ainsi à favoriser un cadre de vie amélioré des populations tout en réduisant leurs dépenses en énergies de cuisson.

Name: Methom
Description:
Methom is a family business, founded in 2023, which purpose is to develop a local renewable methane sector in Guadeloupe.

On this island, methane gas is already produced in significant quantities (in the form of biogas). Currently, it is converted into electricity. In the future, it could be used as Natural Gas for Vehicles (NGV).

In France, the development of NGV is driven by the sharp increase in biogas production. Farmers, food industry, and local communities produce biogas from their organic waste. After purification, this biogas is injected into the network near production sites and distributed remotely in service stations. Vehicles using this biomethane (bioNGV) reduce their emissions by 80% compared to fossil natural gas.

The Caribbean region does not have a gas network. Most methane is imported and fossil. To enable shipment from exporting countries, it is liquefied at low temperature and stored in large bulk. Once it arrives at destination, this Liquefied Natural Gas (LNG) is regasified and primarily used in power plants.

We believe that renewable methane is essential to energy transition of vehicles in the Caribbean (road and maritime transport). Liquefaction and storage in smaller tanks is well-suited to biogas production and fuel distribution from service stations. Such a system can serve the entire Caribbean, powering numerous vehicles, while benefiting from decades of experience with NGV and LNG.

Produced locally, liquefied biomethane (LBM) helps islands, with fragile power grids, transition away from oil, in complete safety and sovereignty. This project deserves to be supported in Guadeloupe: partners are welcome.

Name: .Haryana City Gas Distribution (Bhiwadi) Limited
Description:
.Haryana City Gas Distribution (Bhiwadi) Limited is developing, operating, and expanding its City Gas Distribution (CGD) network under the wings of SKN Group which is already providing CNG & PNG in the geographical area of Gurugram, Haryana and will soon start its operation for city gas distribution in Puducherry.

Under the guidance of Mr. Satish Chopra – Managing Director & Chairman and Mr. Karan Chopra – CEO, the HCGDBL team is developing its city gas distribution network and supplying Compressed Natural Gas (CNG) to the transport sector & Piped Natural Gas (PNG) to Domestic, Industrial & Commercial consumers in CGD Bhiwadi geographical area.

Our effort is to make .Haryana City Gas Distribution (Bhiwadi) Limited, recognized for the integrity of our people, the ethics of our business practices, and the quality of our services. We aim to supply/ provide clean and safe fuel (Natural Gas) for residential, commercial, and industrial use by reducing the high level of pollution and provide seamless after-sale service to our esteemed customers.

We are steadily adding new CGD infrastructure covering new areas to meet the demands of CNG & PNG in Bhiwadi, Rajasthan. The main objective of HCGDBL is to provide safe, convenient, reliable, and cleaner fuel (natural gas) to the residents and establishments of Bhiwadi, Rajasthan as well as to prevent pollution in the region.

Currently, HCGDBL is supplying gas to 125 industries, and work on connectivity for another 40 industries is in progress. HCGDBL is also operating one CNG station and two more CNG stations are under construction. We are continuously working towards fulfilling the requirement of the Industrial & commercial sector and domestic households by expanding the CGD network. Already operating over 200 km of pipeline network and is adding every day. Our company is in the process to develop 8 to 10 CNG filling stations in Bhiwadi under Phase-1.

A empresa se destaca por seu compromisso com a sustentabilidade, fornecendo gás natural e biometano como alternativas ecologicamente responsáveis, contribuindo para uma matriz energética mais equilibrada e com menor impacto ambiental.

A Logás possui bases de abastecimento em várias cidades, incluindo Poços de Caldas, Betim, Barbacena e Ipatinga em Minas Gerais, e Linhares e Aracruz no Espírito Santo. A empresa oferece serviços como compressão, transporte e descompressão de gás natural, além de locação de equipamentos para armazenagem do gás nas bases do cliente.

Sub-Saharan Africa. We excel not only in the management of supply, logistics, and trading of natural gas and related fuels but also in EPC, specializing in a wide array of gas related equipment solutions such a gas generators, gas storage units, skids, as well as gas trucks and truck heads

Name: NeoGas Grid
Description:
NeoGas continua povestea inceputa de Premier Energy in 2013, compania care a lasat o amprenta semnificativa pe piata distributiei de gaze naturale din Romania.

Ne dorim sa ducem mai departe traditia increderii si stabilitatii cladita de Premier Energy, devenind un partener de incredere pentru clientii nostri.

Suntem al treilea cel mai mare distribuitor de gaze naturale din Romania, atat din punct de vedere al volumului, cat si al dimensiunii retelei, operand o infrastructura de peste 3.800 km, din care 80% este deja pregatita pentru distributia de hidrogen verde.

Detinem 118 concesiuni, dintre care 21 sunt greenfield, cu peste 150.000 de locuri de consum la nivel national, deservind atat clienti casnici, cat si clienti non-casnici. Majoritatea concesiunilor noastre sunt localizate in jurul Bucurestiului si in regiunile de sud si vest ale Romaniei, unde ne consolidam in mod constant prezenta strategica.

Name: Gaz et Territoires (ex-SPEGNN)
Description:
Gaz et Territoires (ex-SPEGNN) est le syndicat professionnel qui rassemble toutes les entreprises locales gazières. Ces entreprises, publiques ou coopératives, sont des acteurs historiques du secteur de l'énergie, résolument tournés vers l'avenir et mobilisés pour concrétiser la transition énergétique dans leurs territoires d'implantation.

Depuis sa création en 1947, le SPEGNN est à la fois un lieu d’échange et d’information et un acteur national écouté qui représente ses adhérents auprès des parties prenantes du secteur de l'énergie.

Name: H2 Hauler PTY LTD
Description:
H2 Hauler is Australia’s specialist in mobile gas logistics and virtual pipeline systems, based in Toowoomba, QLD. We support upstream operators, gas producers and marketers by moving CNG, RNG and Hydrogen safely, efficiently and at scale.

We design, manufacture, operate and sell high-performance virtual pipeline solutions, tube trailers, ground storage and gas loading systems that maximise payload and operational uptime. Our equipment is purpose-built for Australia’s regulatory, geographic and environmental conditions.

As Safeguard pressures increase, H2 Hauler helps producers reduce penalties by capturing and monetising gas traditionally lost to flaring, venting or shutdown constraints. Our mobile compression, boosting and transport systems unlock value from appraisal wells, stranded or remote assets, and early-stage production sites where pipelines are unavailable, delayed or uneconomic.

With high-capacity CNG and RNG haulage units, advanced hydrogen transport trailers, and custom-engineered compressor and booster skids, we provide flexible, scalable solutions that expand market access, improve emissions performance and accelerate project timelines.

Growing from strength to strength, DGAS is committed to delivering excellence to its customers. Visit www.dgas.co.id to explore our company.

Name: LNG México
Description:
LNG México es una firma especializada en el desarrollo estratégico de negocios vinculados al Gas Natural Licuado (LNG) en México y Latinoamérica. 
VISIÓN
Ser la firma referente en Latinoamérica en formación, estrategia y conexión de talento para el desarrollo del mercado de LNG, posicionando a México como un actor protagonista en la nueva geografía energética global.
MISIÓN:
Acelerar la consolidación de negocios en torno al Gas Natural Licuado a través de capacitación especializada, asesoría estratégica y la creación de redes de colaboración entre expertos, empresas e instituciones.
Facilitando la consolidación de proyectos en el sector, integrando inteligencia de mercado, alianzas comerciales, desde la identificación de oportunidades hasta el acompañamiento estratégico, a través de análisis de mercado y vinculación comercial.
Nuestro PROPÓSITO es claro: crear la sinergia actuando como catalizador del crecimiento al unir conocimiento técnico con visión de negocio conectando a los actores del sector con oportunidades reales de desarrollo para acelerar la transición energética en México y Latinoamérica. 
Creemos que el LNG es una palanca clave para la transición energética de la región, y nuestra razón de ser es preparar a los profesionales que liderarán esa transformación.
A través de nuestra alianza con Energy Transition Consulting, diseñamos e impartimos programas de formación técnica y ejecutiva que elevan la competitividad y fortalecen las competencias estratégicas de los profesionales del gas natural que buscan estar a la vanguardia de la industria energética y prepararse para responder a las necesidades del mercado actual y anticipar los retos de los próximos años.
En LNG México, creemos que el futuro energético se construye con conocimiento, colaboración y visión de largo plazo.

Name: D.C. Gas Extremadura S.A.
Description:
Gas Extremadura, perteneciente a CL Grupo Industrial, se constituyó en 1996, fecha en la que inició su actividad. Los primeros suministros de gas natural a través de la red de distribución se iniciaron en 1998, en las localidades de Almendralejo y Badajoz.

Desde esa fecha Gas Extremadura ha desarrollado y construido las redes de distribución de las principales localidades extremeñas, facilitando el acceso al gas natural a los vecinos, empresas e industrias, mejorando la calidad de vida en nuestras ciudades, así como la proactividad y competitividad de empresas e industrias extremeñas.

La actividad de esta distribuidora extremeña ha supuesto un avance importante en el sector energético de Extremadura, el acceso al gas natural (una energía cómoda, económica, segura, limpia y respetuosa con el medio ambiente) ha contribuido al desarrollo y modernización de nuestra comunidad al mismo tiempo que permite reducir las emisiones de gases contaminantes y de efecto invernadero mejorando la calidad  del aire en nuestras ciudades.

Nuestro objeto social es la distribución de gas natural por canalización, actividad consistente en la transmisión de gas natural desde las redes de transporte hasta los puntos de suministros, garantizando la disponibilidad del servicio y la calidad del suministro a los usuarios finales.

Contamos con la capacidad legal, técnica y económica establecidas por la normativa vigente para desarrollar la actividad de distribuir gas natural, así como construir, mantener y operar las instalaciones de distribución destinadas a situar el gas en los puntos de consumo.

Name: Society of Gas Operators
Description:
In the late 1940's, a small group of long-time gas industry leaders, located in the middle Atlantic States, were looking for ways to create a forum for people in the gas industry to share their knowledge to identify and solve their common problems, which were a result of the changes in the industry at the time. They also were looking for a way to create an atmosphere of camaraderie and fellowship among their industry co-workers.

This group was comprised of Joe Mulcare of Gas Supplies Materials, Inc., John VanNorden of American Meter Company, Lou Evarts of Long Island Lighting Company and Ernie Weeks of Public Service Electric & Gas.

In 1948, this effort resulted in the formation of the Society of Gas Operators. Lou Evarts served as the first President of the Society. John VanNorden drafted the first Constitution and By-Laws for the Society. He also made the arrangements for the first meetings, which were held at the Engineers' Club in New York City. Later, the meeting site was changed to the Yale Club in NYC, the site where meetings are still held.

Since that time, the Society has conducted over 600 business sessions by meeting monthly, from October to May, each year. Speakers are invited to address the membership at each meeting on topics appropriate to the issues of the day. What was one company's concern becoming the concern of all companies. The collective effort of the group was put to discussing and solving the problems.

SOGO has made a significant contribution to the industry in this manner. By providing a forum for speakers, from inside and outside the industry, to address the changing issues of the industry, SOGO has served as a catalyst for necessary changes in the gas distribution industry from technological and regulatory influences over the last 60 years. In 1996, the Society began to solicit nominations for a Heroism Award (later renamed the Dick Morgan Heroism Award), to provide recognition for extraordinary services or acts of heroism.

The OGA represents its members and the industry in all aspects of their operations before groups including the Ohio General Assembly and the Public Utilities Commission of Ohio. Because of our size and  influence at the state level, OGA accomplishes more, at a much lower cost than an individual gas company can on its own. 

Our primary activities and areas of focus include: 
► Fostering the exchange of information, best  practices and technical support among members.

CRYOTANKERS es una empresa mexicana cuya raíz es Cryoteknium, que a su vez es la única representante de la marca líder internacional SRISEN ENERGY, en México, una compañía de diseño, e ingeniería profesional, especializada en la integración de aplicaciones de Gas Natural en sus etapas de distribución y aprovechamiento, con oficinas centrales en Tianjin, China, la cual distribuye, asesora y da seguimiento a proyectos de implementación de plantas de licuefacción criogénica; estaciones de servicio de gas natural vehicular, tanto comprimido como licuado, recuperación de gases en proceso y sistemas de almacenamiento y transporte de GNC y GNL, y es aquí en donde nace nuestra empresa CRYOTANKERS para desarrollar semi remolques y auto tanques criogénicos orientados al mercado nacional e internacional, para transporte, distribución y trasvase de cualquier tipo de gas licuado (CH4, O2, N2, H2), adaptando nuestros productos a la necesidad del cliente.

Todos los equipos diseñados por CRYOTANKERS, los semirremolques de la familia SIBERIA están montados sobre un chasis certificado en México y armado con componentes de las mejores marcas presentes en el país, por lo que el mantenimiento y refaccionamiento que se requiera en el camino, se obtiene en los canales tradicionales fácilmente accesibles por todo el país.

Name: Gaz des Champs
Description:
Chez Gaz des Champs, nous donnons une nouvelle vie aux déchets agricoles en proposant un CO₂ local, durable et 100 % traçable.

Nous travaillons aux côtés de brasseurs, vignerons, producteurs et artisans soucieux de choisir un gaz cohérent avec leurs pratiques durables et leur savoir-faire.

Pour aller plus loin, notre gaz est conditionné dans des bouteilles innovantes en aluminium et fibre de carbone : plus légères, plus maniables, tout en restant compatibles avec les standards du marché.

Notre ambition : proposer un CO₂ écologique et local, en soutenant l’économie circulaire au cœur des territoires ruraux.

Une énergie produite dans les champs, pour les pros d’aujourd’hui et de demain.

Name: Zipora Gas Ltd
Description:
Zipora Gas Limited is a fully indigenous company specializing in the commercialization of natural gas, dedicated to making natural gas solutions accessible to all, across every corner. Our immediate objective is to assist Nigeria in achieving its total flare-out target by the year 2030.

In pursuit of this mission, the Zipora Consortium was established in 2018. Through active participation in the Nigerian Gas Flare Commercialization Program, the consortium emerged as the preferred bidder and awardee of the Jisike Flare Site (FS_040). Subsequently, the consortium underwent formal incorporation as Zipora Gas Limited.

We remain unwavering in our commitment to harnessing natural gas resources responsibly, contributing to sustainable development, and cultivating a brighter energy future for Nigeria and globally.

W Media Transfer Solutions Sp. z o.o. łączymy światowej klasy technologie regulatorów ciśnienia z potrzebami polskich operatorów sieci gazowych i wodociągowych.
Jako lokalny dystrybutor i dostawca usług technicznych dostarczamy niezawodne, efektywne i niskoemisyjne rozwiązania w zakresie regulacji ciśnienia — wspierane przez zespół wykwalifikowanych inżynierów.

Nasi inżynierowie oferują wsparcie w zakresie przeglądów, konserwacji i serwisowania powiązanego sprzętu, zapewniając bezpieczną i wydajną pracę instalacji przez cały okres jej eksploatacji.

Współpracując z wiodącymi producentami z całego świata, łączymy innowacyjne technologie z lokalnym doświadczeniem technicznym — pomagając naszym klientom modernizować infrastrukturę i przygotować się na przyszłość opartą na wodorze.

Name: NISOGAS S.A.
Description:
Βάζουμε το Αιγαίο μπροστά!
Η ΝΗΣΟΓΚΑΖ δραστηριοποιείται στον χώρο των υγραερίων και είναι αμιγώς Ελληνική. Με έδρα την ακριτική Κάλυμνο και εγκαταστάσεις σε Kάλυμνο, Κω και Νάξο, βρίσκεται πάντα δίπλα στα νησιά του Αιγαίου, καλύπτοντας τις ενεργειακές ανάγκες νοικοκυριών και επιχειρήσεων κάθε κλάδου, από τον αγροτικό έως τον τουριστικό και τον βιομηχανικό.

Τι μας ξεχωρίζει
Στόχος μας είναι πάντα να προσφέρουμε την υψηλή ποιότητα υπηρεσιών ενός μεγάλου ομίλου ενέργειας, παραμένοντας στον πυρήνα μας μια οικογενειακή επιχείρηση, γέννημα-θρέμμα της νησιωτικής Ελλάδας, που γνωρίζει από πρώτο χέρι τις ανάγκες των νησιών μας και ανταποκρίνεται με ευελιξία και προσωπική εξυπηρέτηση.

Μήνυμα Διευθύνοντος Συμβούλου
Αγαπητοί Συνεργάτες,

Είναι μεγάλη μας τιμή που μας δίνεται η δυνατότητα να εξυπηρετούμε ενεργειακά για περισσότερο από 50 χρόνια τα νησιά του Αιγαίου με υγραέριο.

Παρ’ όλες τις αντίξοες συνθήκες που επικρατούν στην αγορά τα τελευταία χρόνια, η εταιρεία παραμένει πιστή στο όραμά της και επεκτείνει τις δραστηριότητες της. Με το ιδιόκτητό της πλοίο Άγιος Αντώνιος εξυπηρετεί τους νησιώτες ακόμα και στο πιο απομακρυσμένο νησί. Απασχολεί περισσότερους από 30 εργαζόμενους και διαθέτει 23 ιδιόκτητα φορτηγά οχήματα. Με τρεις ιδιόκτητες εγκαταστάσεις αποθήκευσης και εμφιάλωσης υγραερίου, στρατηγικά τοποθετημένες στην καρδιά του Αιγαίου, αποτελεί την πιο αξιόπιστη και οικονομική λύση.

Επιταχύνοντας τον ψηφιακό μετασχηματισμό της, η εταιρεία μας αναπτύσσει νέες καινοτόμες υπηρεσίες που θα διαθέσει σύντομα σε καταναλωτές και επιχειρήσεις. Μείνετε κοντά μας για την επόμενη μέρα της καθαρής ενέργειας στο Αιγαίο!

Με εκτίμηση,
Αντώνης Ψαρομπάς

Tο Όραμά μας
Να υποστηρίζουμε τα νησιά του Αιγαίου με καθαρή και προσιτή ενέργεια, συμβάλλοντας στην οικονομική τους δραστηριότητα και ανάπτυξη.

Οι Καινοτομίες μας
Στη ΝΗΣΟΓΚΑΖ θέλουμε κάθε μέρα να γινόμαστε καλύτεροι. Αξιοποιούμε τις νέες τεχνολογίες και τις εξελίξεις στον κλάδο της ενέργειας για να σας προσφέρουμε έξυπνες λύσεις.

Name: Gas Service
Description:
La ditta Gas Service è specializzata nella fornitura di una gamma molto ampia di prodotti, dai gas per la saldatura, gas per il laboratorio analisi, per la conservazione degli alimenti, gas propano e GPL per il riscaldamento e la cucina e dai tradizionali fluorocarburi refrigeranti ai refrigeranti naturali coprendo tutte le possibili applicazioni. 
La ditta è un distributore di riferimento nella provincia di Roma di gas grazie alle sue capacità logistiche ed operative.

Servizi professionali
La ditta offre ai suoi clienti prodotti pronti all'uso. 
Vengono quindi commercializzati una vasta gamma di gas tramite molteplici modalità di fornitura, un'offerta che è supportata da una vasta esperienza nell'ambito tecnico, della salute e della sicurezza. 
Si fornisce consulenza tecnica ed assistenza professionale per soddisfare le normative ed i requisiti richiesti.

Dalla collaborazione con Linde, azienda leader mondiale nel settore della fornitura di gas industriali, nasce la Gas Service, punto di riferimento a Roma e provincia nella fornitura di gas liquidi, freon, bombole di gas, materiale per la saldatura con punte da taglio, cannelli, valvole di sicurezza e riduttori di pressione.

Standard sicuri e qualità
Le impurità come l'umidità possono diminuire l'efficienza dei gas. 
I prodotti offerti ed il relativo confezionamento sono sottoposti ai severi controlli per garantire standard sicuri e la migliore qualità. 
La Gas Service propone:
Gas Industriali
Gas Refrigeranti
Gas Alimentati
Gas Puri
Gas Propano/GPL
Gas Liquidi
Bombole di Gas Compresso

Name: OCEAN DOĞAL GAZ ENERJİ
Description:
OC GROUP bünyesinde hizmet veren OCEAN Doğalgaz Petrol Enerji Sanayi ve Ticaret isimli şirketimiz doğalgaz sektöründe hizmet sunmaktadır. Farklı ihtiyaçlara yönelik tedarik yapımız, müşterilerimize özel esnek çözümlerimiz ve uzman yönetim tecrübemizle, yurt içinde ve yurt dışında sektörün ihtiyaçlarına uygun ürün ve hizmetlerin karşılanması için kurulmuştur.

Uluslararası Doğalgaz İthalatı, İhracatı ve toptan satış ticareti ile başta ülkemizin ihtiyaçlarını karşılamakla beraber, diğer ülkelerin doğalgaz ihtiyacını en uygun fiyata, en kısa zaman içerisinde temin etmekteyiz.

Enerji sektöründeki yenilikçi çözümlerimiz ve çevreye duyarlı yaklaşımımız ile çalışmalarımızı sürdürüyoruz. Doğalgaz alanındaki güçlü uzmanlığımız ve sürdürülebilir enerji projelerine olan bağlılığımız, şirketimizi enerji sektöründe benzersiz kılan unsurlardan biridir. Müşterilerimize güvenilir, verimli ve çevre dostu enerji çözümleri sunarak, yenilikçi teknolojileri kullanarak uluslararası standartlara uygun projelerle enerji sektöründe öne çıkmaktayız. Şeffaf iş politikalarımız, enerji verimliliğine odaklı çalışmalarımız ve topluma katkı sağlayan sürdürülebilirlik projelerimizle şirketimiz, geleceğin enerji ihtiyaçlarına çözüm sunmaktadır.

Name: Amma Gas
Description: Amma Gas is a pioneering natural gas distribution company in India, focused on revolutionizing the traditional gas supply model by providing large-scale gas storage solutions to apartments, hospitals, businesses, and households. The company installs substantial LNG or CNG tanks at customer locations, such as residential complexes, offices, and manufacturing facilities, and delivers gas through a network of pipes connected to individual meters, allowing customers to pay based on their actual usage. Amma Gas operates a fleet of lorries to refill these tanks from its central storage, ensuring continuous supply. The company also aims to extend its services to rural areas, delivering cooking gas directly to households, with a mission to provide efficient, reliable, and affordable gas solutions across India. With dedicated departments for sales, service, logistics, and customer support, Amma Gas is committed to becoming a leader in the Indian gas distribution industry.

Dalla collaborazione con Linde, azienda leader mondiale nel settore della fornitura di gas industriali, nasce la Gas Service, punto di riferimento a Roma e provincia nella fornitura di gas liquidi, freon, bombole di gas, materiale per la saldatura con punte da taglio, cannelli, valvole di sicurezza e riduttori di pressione.

Standard sicuri e qualità
Le impurità come l'umidità possono diminuire l'efficienza dei gas.
I prodotti offerti ed il relativo confezionamento sono sottoposti ai severi controlli per garantire standard sicuri e la migliore qualità.
